name: ICICI Prudential Nifty Low Vol
summary: ICICI Prudential Nifty Low Vol is an open-ended scheme tracking the Nifty Low Volatility 50 Index. The scheme invests in stocks from the Nifty 100 and Nifty Midcap 50 indices with the lowest volatility. It is managed by ICICI Prudential Asset Management Company.
